# BP-72 negative: bare nil and a non-nil concrete error are safe returns
lang: go
file: BP-72-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

type typedError struct{}

func (*typedError) Error() string {
	return "typed error"
}

func bareNil() error {
	return nil
}

func concreteError() error {
	return &typedError{}
}

func reassignedBeforeReturn() error {
	var err *typedError = nil
	err = &typedError{}
	return error(err)
}
